title: Principal Plant Manager at Daikin India International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Principal Plant Manager at Daikin India International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
We at Daikin India International Enterprises are looking for an experienced Plant Manager based out of Howrah. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Daikin India International Enterprises:
Daikin India International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in PPAP

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Daikin India International Enterprises!
